notes: v1.14.1 — RECONCILE: external v1.14.0 (Phase Pipeline) + the repo's full-bleed landing. Imported the external/web-Claude v1.14.0 build (new in-app PHASE PIPELINE on the NOW dashboard, replacing the rack skyline, driven by rollup.phaseAgg) which had branched from this repo at v1.13.5 and was MISSING the repo's v1.13.7/v1.13.8 full-bleed landing work. Re-applied those 4 surgical edits on top: .pl-stage clamp(380px,55vh,540px) -> flex:1 1 auto; min-height:0; globe radius min(W,H)*0.45 -> min(W*0.45, H*0.40); #boot padding calc(safe-top+32) 24px calc(safe-bottom+24) -> 0 24px 0; .pl-hint bottom 12px -> calc(12px + var(--safe-bottom)). Result has BOTH the Phase Pipeline AND the full-bleed (no top/bottom dead-band) landing. Gate: v1.14.0 parsed clean before import (node --check 3/3, braces balanced). Verified after: node --check 3/3 inline scripts, CSS braces balanced, CRLF preserved on dct-ios.html & sw.js (0 lone LF; version.json LF), four stamps lockstep at v1.14.1, sw.js cache-bumped. NOT device-verified -- needs an on-device pass on iPhone Safari (full-bleed landing top/bottom + the new Phase Pipeline render on the NOW dashboard).
